title: [NO TESTS NEEDED] Fixes panic condition in cgroups.getAvailableControllers
body:
Signed-off-by: zhangguanzhang <zhangguanzhang@qq.com>
Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/10666
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:

Every single system test flaked, we have to get some eyes on the podman-pause cgroup flake.

LGTM
if we can ever get the system tests hip.
